description: A non-native calendar date-picker (grid of day cells, not <input type=date>) requires navigating to the correct month before a day is clickable. Tests whether the model reads the currently-displayed month before clicking a day, rather than clicking day "15" blind and assuming it is the intended month.

seed.content:
[Current page context — URL: https://booking.example.com/reserve — Title: Book a Reservation]

Book a reservation for August 15th.

antiPatterns.reason: Day cell "15" belongs to the currently-displayed July grid, not August — clicking it would book the wrong month entirely without ever checking which month is shown.

expected.successRubric: Notice the calendar is showing July, not August, and click "Next month" to advance before selecting day 15 — do not click a day-15 cell while the wrong month is displayed.
